attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT TMP.HEADER_ID	,
TMP.REQUEST_NUMBER	,
TMP.TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID	,
TMP.MOVE_ORDER_TYPE	,
TMP.ORGANIZATION_ID	,
TMP.DESCRIPTION	,
TMP.DATE_REQUIRED	,
TMP.FROM_SUBINVENTORY_CODE	,
TMP.TO_SUBINVENTORY_CODE	,
TMP.TO_ACCOUNT_ID	,
TMP.HEADER_STATUS	,
TMP.STATUS_DATE	,
TMP.LAST_UPDATED_BY	,
TMP.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN	,
TMP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE	,
TMP.CREATED_BY	,
TMP.CREATION_DATE	,
TMP.REQUEST_ID	,
TMP.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID	,
TMP.PROGRAM_ID	,
TMP.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE1	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE2	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE3	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE4	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE5	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE6	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE7	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE8	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE9	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE10	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE11	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE12	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE13	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE14	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE15	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY	,
TMP.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID	,
TMP.FREIGHT_CODE	,
TMP.SHIPMENT_METHOD	,
TMP.AUTO_RECEIPT_FLAG	,
TMP.REFERENCE_ID	,
TMP.REFERENCE_DETAIL_ID	,
TMP.ASSIGNMENT_ID,	
'CG' AS GLOBAL_NAME,
SOURCE_DML_TYPE,SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,REFRESH_DATETIME
FROM  
(SELECT HEADER_ID	,
REQUEST_NUMBER	,
TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID	,
MOVE_ORDER_TYPE	,
ORGANIZATION_ID	,
DESCRIPTION	,
DATE_REQUIRED	,
FROM_SUBINVENTORY_CODE	,
TO_SUBINVENTORY_CODE	,
TO_ACCOUNT_ID	,
HEADER_STATUS	,
STATUS_DATE	,
LAST_UPDATED_BY	,
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN	,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE	,
CREATED_BY	,
CREATION_DATE	,
REQUEST_ID	,
PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID	,
PROGRAM_ID	,
PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE	,
ATTRIBUTE1	,
ATTRIBUTE2	,
ATTRIBUTE3	,
ATTRIBUTE4	,
ATTRIBUTE5	,
ATTRIBUTE6	,
ATTRIBUTE7	,
ATTRIBUTE8	,
ATTRIBUTE9	,
ATTRIBUTE10	,
ATTRIBUTE11	,
ATTRIBUTE12	,
ATTRIBUTE13	,
ATTRIBUTE14	,
ATTRIBUTE15	,
ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY	,
SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID	,
FREIGHT_CODE	,
SHIPMENT_METHOD	,
AUTO_RECEIPT_FLAG	,
REFERENCE_ID	,
REFERENCE_DETAIL_ID	,
ASSIGNMENT_ID	,
SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
REFRESH_DATETIME
 FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_HEADERS
WHERE  SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <=  '$$EndLastExtractDate' 
AND SOURCE_DML_TYPE<>'DELETE') TMP
QUALIFY RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY TMP.HEADER_ID ORDER BY TMP. HEADER_ID, TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC ) = 1
